title: ae2helpers
description: Small addon for AE2 for 1.21.1. Adds the option to auto-import pending crafts in the crafting terminal. Also adds a "Crafting Result Import Card" item.
body:
**ae2helpers** is a Quality of Life addon for Applied Energistics 2 designed to make autocrafting setups smoother and more compact.

# Features

**1\. Crafting Result Import Card:** A specialized upgrade for the **Pattern Provider**.

*   **What it does:** Allows a Pattern Provider to **push** ingredients to a machine and **pull** the finished results back using the same face.
*   **Benefit:** Eliminates the need for separate Import Buses or Item Pipes.
*   Only useful / needed on machines that don't automatically push their results to neighboring machines (such as the vanilla furnace).

**2\. Automatic Recipe Insertion:** An improved **Crafting Terminal** workflow.

*   **What it does:** When you request an autocraft for a recipe in the terminal, the grid enters a "waiting" state with Ghost Items.
*   **Benefit:** The moment your CPUs finish the job, the items are **automatically inserted** into the grid. No more waiting around to click the recipe again!
*   Works with JEI, EMI and REI

Small showcase of the automatic insertion. Notice how the items are automatically loaded into the crafting grid:

![Auto Import Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e241ead24f849a1c7e4aaf000df4fcc99a4161.gif)

This mod (obviously) requires AE2 to be installed. I will not be backporting it. There's a config for the added features.

Includes compatibility with applied flux and me soul card. Since they both add upgrade slots to the pattern provider, I decided to
go the non-invasive route and just add a separate slot to avoid needing mixins into those mods.

@AE2 / RS2 devs: Feel free to copy this feature (and/or code).
